name: slash_command
description: Proves the workspace-provisioned slash command at `.claude/commands/check-order.md` was loaded and executed (not treated as plain text). The command file mandates three things: (a) call `mcp__orders_db__get_order`, (b) reply in strict `ORDER|<id>|<customer>|<status>|<tracking>` format on a single line with NO preamble, (c) NO trailing skill marker. We assert all three via one `reply_pattern` regex (full-line, anchored) plus a `not_contains` deny-list for the routing-failure modes. The absence of `[via orders-helper]` simultaneously proves Claude routed through the slash command and NOT through the auto-discoverable orders-helper skill (which mandates that marker on every reply).
